situation: SZ-SP-L-007 (low): handleViewHistory only sets result/imageData/tab when loading a history item, leaving editMode/customRegions/ocrCache/originalRegions/deletedStack/error/debugInfo/progress from the previously viewed image intact. Stale editing state bleeds across history views — user sees wrong regions/edit mode on a fresh history entry.
action: Added full editing-state reset (setError/setProgress/setDebugInfo/setEditMode/setCustomRegions/setOcrCache/setOriginalRegions to null/none) before setting new result/imageData/tab in handleViewHistory. Mirrors handleReset cleanup list minus the imageData/result nulling (which get overwritten immediately). Case-104 direct-edit escape hatch used because cp-guard skipped diverged file.
outcome_evidence: Commit 715af46 on auto/opt-sidepanel-1782907225 pushed to origin. Diff: +10 lines in handleViewHistory adding 7 setState resets before existing set calls. No type errors (TS useCallback deps unchanged — all setters are stable references).
next_suggestion: Next pending fix: SZ-PP-L-001 (Base64 prefix strip regex rejects valid MIME subtypes) or SZ-PP-L-002 (testVisionConnection no timeout). 14 route-fixes remaining after this one.

audit_findings.finding: handleViewHistory does not reset editing state — stale editMode/customRegions/ocrCache/deletedStack bleeds across images when viewing history
audit_findings.remediation: Add full editing-state reset (mirroring handleReset) before setting new result/imageData/tab
